absorb_workflow.source: sz absorb draft plus deterministic protocol adapter

behaviors: read repo profile and installed module registry
capture current branch and dirty-file counts when git is available
write a module-private session bootstrap payload
public_purpose: Builds a deterministic session-start payload from repo profile, git state, and module health.
reconstruction: Protocol-native behavior was re-derived from the source candidate and hardened into an anonymized System Zero module.
source_summary: Task: Bootstrap START-PROTOCOL session context into one deterministic JSON payload.
